untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit divergence detection (type 6 bullish/type 7 bearish) with multi-series confirmation logic and normalized channel analysis over 60-day lookback. The allowed indicator set lacks a dedicated divergence detector or the ability to compare price action against multiple companion series simultaneously with threshold displacement measurement. The 'companion_series_confirmation_count': 2 requirement cannot be structurally expressed without custom divergence detection logic.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using RSI divergence proxy (RSI vs price) with ATR threshold displacement (≥20) and SMA reconvergence logic, but this does not capture the full multi-series confirmation and normalized channel methodology described in the original rule.
